category_sources: Official docs describe minikube as setting up a local Kubernetes cluster for application developers and new Kubernetes users.
source_facts.description says it runs a Kubernetes cluster locally.
display_name_sources: Official docs and repository use the name minikube.
docs_sources: Official homepage source_facts.homepage is minikube.sigs.k8s.io, and its dedicated documentation section is /docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Kubernetes and local cluster purpose.
source_facts.executables lists the CLI executable minikube.
